concept: Determined / Firmly Resolved / Unwavering in Purpose
description: Having made a firm decision and being resolved not to change it. 'Kesu' names the quality of determination—the steadfast will that persists toward its aim.
sound_symbolism: The word holds firm. 'Ke' begins with clear resolve, decision made. Then 'su' sustains with steady force, determination maintained.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'kesu miona' (determined person). Related to 'kolu' (steady) but emphasizes purposeful resolve rather than general stability.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Right effort requires determination—the resolve to continue practice despite difficulty.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Determined communities persist—the resolve to build better futures despite obstacles.
